ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "gsm" TEXT /* GSM ID for the dataset */,
  "source_name_ch1" TEXT /* Name of the source for the first organism */,
  "organism_ch1" TEXT /* Organism of the first channel */,
  "organism_ch2" TEXT /* Organism of the second channel (if applicable) */,
  "gpl" TEXT /* GPL identifier for the platform used */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Name of the platform used for data collection */,
  "platform_description" TEXT /* Description of the platform used */,
  "technology" TEXT /* Technology used for data collection */,
  "gse" TEXT /* GSE identifier for the experiment series */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of dataset submission */,
  "pubmed_id" INTEGER /* PubMed identifier for published studies */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the study */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the study */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the study was published */,
  "version_controlled" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if version control is enabled for the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., microarray, sequencing) */,
  "experimental_conditions" TEXT /* Description of the experimental conditions under which the data was collected */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score for the dataset */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Level of accessibility (e.g., public, private, restricted) */,
  "curator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who curated the dataset */,
  "last_curated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last curation */,
  "curation_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the curator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_gse FOREIGN KEY ("gse") REFERENCES experiments ("gse"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_curator_id FOREIGN KEY ("curator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_gpl FOREIGN KEY ("gpl") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_organism_ch1 FOREIGN KEY ("organism_ch1") REFERENCES organisms ("organism_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "organisms" (
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organism */,
  "organism_name" TEXT /* Common name of the organism */,
  "taxonomy_id" INTEGER /* Taxonomy identifier for the organism */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the organism */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the organism */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Biological kingdom of the organism */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the platform */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the platform */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the platform */,
  "technology_type" TEXT /* Type of technology used (e.g., microarray, sequencing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submission_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the submission method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the submission method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of submission method (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "method_url" TEXT /* URL for the submission method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "pubmed_id" INTEGER /* PubMed identifier for the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication appeared */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_pubmed_id FOREIGN KEY ("pubmed_id") REFERENCES datasets ("pubmed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* User's institution */,
  "department" TEXT /* User's department */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Additional affiliations */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "gse" TEXT /* GSE identifier for the experiment series */,
  "experiment_title" TEXT /* Title of the experiment */,
  "design_description" TEXT /* Description of the experimental design */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., case-control, time-series) */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* Detailed description of the study design */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published, deprecated) */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the version */,
  "review_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datafiles" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format (e.g., FASTQ, BAM) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity */,
  "compression_type" TEXT /* Compression type (e.g., gzip, bzip2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datafiles_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
